statement: If agents are allowed to routinely edit their own instruction, agent, skill, or hook files during unrelated implementation work, customization quality becomes self-referential and fragile. Protect the customization control surface with deterministic hooks or equivalent approval gates.
publicSummary: Hooks are the deterministic layer; they are a better place than prose instructions to protect high-risk customization files from accidental mutation.
cautionNotes: Guardrails should still allow explicit customization work when the user asks for it.
nonGeneralizationNotes: Describe the protected area generically as the customization control surface rather than naming a private workspace layout.
